name: hk_1_11
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-01-22 across ROADSIDE stations compute and store: mean_co_0800 (mean CO at 08:00), mean_co_1400 (mean CO at 14:00) (float), co_difference (0800 minus 1400, float), n_roadside_stations (int).

turns.query: Compare CO levels at roadside stations during peak (08:00) vs. off-peak (14:00) hours on January 22, 2025.
